---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to the local-first brand-system workflow
title: "feature: "
---

## Summary

Describe the idea in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

What should the app do differently?

## Why It Fits

Explain why this belongs in Brand Kit Studio instead of a hosted design suite or a one-off script.

## Trust Boundary Notes

Would this stay local-first, or would it add provider, capture, or install risk?

## Extra Context

Links, sketches, examples, or related issues.
